intro: Juncoides hieronymi, also known as Hierochloe, is a type of grass-like flowering plant belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The bioactive constituents of Hierochloe include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Hierochloe is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels.
